name: HRC_DL_PARENT_KEYS_GT
description: Stores logical object information temporarily during data loader import process.

columns.Name: KEY_LINE_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key column generated by the sequence S_ROW_ID_SEQ.

columns.Name: DATA_SET_BUS_OBJ_ID
columns.Comments: DATA_SET_BUS_OBJ_ID to which the current row belongs to. The value is populated from HRC_DL_FILE_HEADERS.DATA_SET_BUS_OBJ_ID

columns.Name: HEADER_ID
columns.Comments: HEADER_ID to which the current row belongs to. The value is populated from HRC_DL_FILE_HEADERS.HEADER_ID table.

columns.Name: KEY_GUID
columns.Comments: The GUID value supplied for the logical object.  This value is populated from HRC_DL_FILE_ROWS.KEY_GUID table.

columns.Name: KEY_SURROGATE_ID
columns.Comments: The Oracle Fusion Surrogate ID supplied for the logical object. This value is populated from HRC_DL_FILE_ROWS.KEY_SURROGATE_ID table.

columns.Name: KEY_SOURCE_OWNER
columns.Comments: The source owner supplied for the logical. This value is populated from HRC_DL_FILE_ROWS.KEY_SOURCE_OWNER table.

columns.Name: KEY_SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: The source ID supplied for the logical object. This value is populated from HRC_DL_FILE_ROWS.KEY_SOURCE_ID table.

columns.Name: PARENT_KEY
columns.Comments: Key information of the parent object. This can be GUID/Surrogate id/Source id.

columns.Name: PARENT_SRC_OWNER
columns.Comments: Source owner of the parent object.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise_ID, the value is populated from HRC_DL_FILE_HEADERS.ENTERPRISE_ID table.

columns.Name: IS_SRC_INFO_VALID
columns.Comments: Y/N flag. Status of Parent source information validation.

columns.Name: PARENT_REFERENCE
columns.Comments:
Status of Parent resolution. 

   -1 = Parent not found
    0 = No need to resolve the Parent reference for top level business object  
    1 = Parent in File
    2 = Parent in HRC_DL_INTEGRATION_KEY_MAP table
    3 = Parent in Fusion

columns.Name: IS_FOREIGN_KEY_RESOLVED
columns.Comments: Y/N flag. Status of foreign key resolution.
